name: Nut Crust
recipeIngredient: 4 tbsp Margarine, cut into small pieces
1 1/4 cup Flour (white, with a little whole wheat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place nuts, margarine, salt, and flour together in a bowl.
2. Use a pastry cutter to work the mixture until it is uniform and resembles coarse cornmeal.
3. Gradually drizzle in the cold water, alternating between using a pastry cutter and a fork.
4. Mix by pushing the dough into itself in the center of the bowl.
5. When the dough adheres to itself, you've added enough water.
6. Roll out the dough and form your crust. Chill until time to fill.
Adapted from The Enchanted Broccoli Forest by Mollie Katzen.
